bootstrap.method: fixed-seed percentile bootstrap of replicate mean paired differences, sampling replicates with replacement

formulae.mean_difference: arithmetic mean of paired contact-minus-null differences across replicates at one requested gamma
formulae.paired_difference: contact_homophily value - null_gamma value for the same replicate and requested gamma
formulae.standard_deviation: sample standard deviation of paired differences (zero when only one replicate is present)

interpretation: This report is descriptive only. The condition labels do not identify a causal effect; these summaries support no causal inference and no causal inference is made.

checks: exactly one null_gamma and one contact_homophily record per replicate/requested gamma
paired seeds and initial_state_fingerprint values match
required cluster metrics and included kernel metrics are finite
